code:
import io

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  mut line_number = 1
  mut line = io.read_line()
  while true
    match line
    when None
      return Ok(())
    when Some(content)
      print("#{line_number}: #{content}")
      line_number = line_number + 1
      line = io.read_line()
    end
  end
  Ok(())
end
